figures.caption: Figure 1: Illustration of the proposed Dual Prediction Violation (DPV) mechanism. Setup statements establish temporal and semantic expectations through regular patterns (0.6s pauses, small semantic distances between consecutive sentences). The punchline simultaneously violates both dimensions: an extended pause (1.5s) disrupts established rhythm while semantically distant content deviates sharply from contextual predictions. This strategic coupling of temporal and semantic violations creates conditions for efficient prediction error resolution, generating humor.
